project.name: skillget
project.summary: A mixed product/tooling repository for ClawHub intelligence gathering, AISA-focused market analysis, suspicious package optimization, and breakout-playbook internalization into reusable Codex skills and prompts for downstream agent-skills-io execution.
primaryGoals: Scrape ClawHub skills and plugins, detect probable AISA API usage, and publish a searchable static dashboard.
Repackage selected suspicious ClawHub skills into runtime-preserving optimized bundles with verification and downloadable release artifacts.
Turn market-analysis conclusions into reusable global Codex skills and execution prompts that downstream agent-skills-io can apply for breakout skill retrofits and releases.

systems.name: ClawHub Intelligence Collection
systems.purpose: Collect metadata from ClawHub accounts, catalog pages, and item detail pages, then normalize it into a machine-readable catalog.
capabilities: GitHub skill to ClawHub skill conversion

systems.name: Static Dashboard
systems.purpose: Render the generated catalog, archive-level AISA API analysis, and optimized package index as a searchable static site.
capabilities: standalone ClawHub skills multi-ranking page across downloads, stars, installs, cross-board hits, and AISA priorities
standalone ClawHub plugin catalog/filter/trust page plus Markdown + Word reports
standalone cross-market intelligence page combining ClawHub, Claude Marketplaces, Hermes, AgentSkill, and AgentSkills.so datasets
standalone Claude, Hermes, AgentSkill, and AgentSkills.so Markdown + Word report generation
public Word report download for system analysis and report-library exports
public Chinese report and boss brief download

systems.name: Suspicious Package Optimization Pipeline
systems.purpose: Download, trim, template, verify, package, and publish optimized bundles for suspicious ClawHub skills.
knownManualSteps: Original zip unpacking into artifacts/original-unpacked/ is not shown as a fully automated in-repo step.
OAuth approval and real write-path tests still require manual validation.

systems.name: Chinese Optimized Package Pipeline
systems.purpose: Clone optimized packages, swap in Chinese SKILL templates, then package and publish Chinese zip artifacts.
capabilities: copy filtered runtime files from optimized source packages

systems.name: Skill Assets And Reference Implementations
systems.purpose: Store reusable skill packages, templates, and a full-featured standalone skill example.
outputs: research brief or JSON output from last30days
skill package templates for optimized bundles

npmScripts.build: Scrape ClawHub, regenerate AISA API analysis data, and build the static site.
npmScripts.scrape: Run the ClawHub scraper and regenerate catalog.json.
npmScripts.analyze:aisa: Scan all public/downloads skill archives and regenerate public/data/aisa-api-analysis.json.
npmScripts.analyze:clawhub-multi-ranking: Fetch the latest ClawHub downloads/stars/installs top lists and regenerate the boss-facing multi-ranking report assets.
npmScripts.analyze:clawhub-viral-boss: Generate the long-form boss report that turns multi-ranking market analysis into a ClawHub viral-skill playbook and Word deliverable.
npmScripts.analyze:aisa-expansion-plans: Generate full breakout plans for current AISA skills plus a ranked Top 200 non-AISA conversion plan and Word deliverables.
npmScripts.analyze:market-ecosystem: Refresh cross-market intelligence data and publish separate Claude and Hermes EN/ZH Markdown + Word AISA reports.
npmScripts.analyze:agentskill: Capture current AgentSkill skill/plugin leaderboard samples plus detail-page trust signals and publish JSON plus EN/ZH Markdown + Word reports.
npmScripts.analyze:agentskills-so: Capture current AgentSkills.so skill samples plus detail-page security/download/repo signals and publish JSON plus EN/ZH Markdown + Word reports.
npmScripts.analyze:full-report-suite: Run the full report-generation chain through a wrapper that continues with cached outputs when a single live report step fails transiently.
npmScripts.sync:report-docx: Backfill or refresh .docx companions for Markdown report files in reports/ and public/reports/.
npmScripts.pipeline:aisa-analysis: Refresh ClawHub and GitHub skill archives, rebuild AISA analysis data, then build the static site.
npmScripts.pipeline:scheduled-analysis: Refresh downloads, AISA analysis, all major report datasets, then build the static site as the underlying full-refresh command behind pipeline:pages or direct manual runs.
npmScripts.pipeline:pages: Run the same full analysis-and-build command path used by GitHub Pages deployments.
npmScripts.build:source-optimized: Build English optimized package directories from original-unpacked sources.
npmScripts.build:source-optimized-zh: Build Chinese optimized package directories from source-optimized packages.
npmScripts.package:source-optimized: Zip English optimized packages into release artifacts.
npmScripts.package:source-optimized-zh: Zip Chinese optimized packages into release artifacts.
npmScripts.verify:source-optimized: Run static checks for optimized packages.
npmScripts.live-test:source-optimized: Run AISA-backed smoke tests for optimized packages.
npmScripts.publish:optimized-downloads: Publish optimized package metadata and copy zips into public downloads.
npmScripts.download:suspicious-zips: Download suspicious skill zips referenced by catalog.json.
npmScripts.refresh:clawhub-owner-seeds: Use Playwright-rendered owner pages to refresh clawhub-hash-format-urls.csv for tracked accounts.
npmScripts.download:clawhub-account-skills: Refresh rendered owner seeds when available, scrape ClawHub, then download all skills for tracked accounts into public/downloads/clawHub/, trying the CN mirror first and falling back to the ClawHub-origin URL.
npmScripts.download:github-account-skills: Treat catalog owners as GitHub usernames, scan public repos for SKILL.md, and package discovered skill directories into public/downloads/github/.
npmScripts.deploy:server: Run the server deployment helper to build the site and sync dist/ into the configured web root.

importantData.role: Primary normalized dataset consumed by the dashboard and downstream packaging flows.
Archive-level interface and skill analysis dataset used by the GitHub Pages dashboard.
Published index of optimized bundles shown in the dashboard.
Static verification report for optimized packages.
Live smoke test report for optimized packages.
Latest multi-ranking market analysis data across downloads, stars, installs, and AISA local-package priorities.
Structured breakout upgrade plan for all current AISA skills tracked by the repo.
Top 200 cross-ranking analysis plus ranked non-AISA candidates most suitable for conversion into AISA-based skills.
Base cross-market intelligence dataset for ClawHub, Claude Marketplaces, and Hermes, loaded alongside AgentSkill and AgentSkills.so datasets in the unified AISA opportunity page.
AgentSkill-specific dataset covering visible skill/plugin leaderboard samples, trust/rating signals, creators, and AISA conversion opportunities.
AgentSkills.so dataset covering sampled skills, author factories, security posture, weekly downloads, and AISA conversion opportunities.
Public browser-friendly report library that explains which generated report covers which market or planning question.

workflowDocs.role: Operational spec for archive refresh, AISA endpoint analysis, validation, and acceptance.
Copy-ready prompt for running breakout-skill retrofit and publish work inside the downstream agent-skills-io repository.
Chat-independent handbook covering project functions, pages, datasets, report families, and recommended starting paths.
Script catalog covering npm aliases, direct file responsibilities, inputs/outputs, and CLI parameter or environment-variable notes.
Repo-local report index that explains the purpose of each generated report family.

automation.role: GitHub Pages deployment workflow; runs pipeline:pages on push, schedule, and manual dispatch, keeps CI timezone aligned to Asia/Shanghai, retries transient failures, prevents overlapping runs, and uploads analysis/report artifacts for troubleshooting.

keyDirectories.role: Operational scripts for scraping, interface analysis, building, verifying, packaging, and publishing.
Published JSON data consumed by the frontend.
Published report copies plus the public report library page.
Shareable local-template files such as example/accounts; real private credentials stay in ignored local files.
Template SKILL.md sources for optimized packaging.

assumptionsAndRisks: AISA detection in the scraper is heuristic, not authoritative.
Global ClawHub catalog traversal is less reliable than account-page discovery.
Some packaging and runtime acceptance steps remain manual.
Repository contains generated assets, historical CSVs, and active work-in-progress changes.
